innateAbility.name: Invoke
innateAbility.description: Combines the properties of all current Orb element instances into a new spell.The higher the Orbs' level, the lower the ability cooldown.

abilities.name: Quas
abilities.description: Manipulates the ice element of Invoker's abilities.Each active Quas orb instance grants health regeneration bonus corresponding to the orb's ability level.

abilities.name: Wex
abilities.description: Manipulates the storm element of Invoker's abilities.Each active orb instance grants Invoker passive traits according to the orb's ability level.

abilities.name: Exort
abilities.description: Manipulates the fire element of Invoker's abilities.Each active orb instance grants Invoker passive traits according to the orb's ability level.

abilities.name: Invoked Spell 1
abilities.description: New invoked abilities are always placed in the fourth ability slot.

abilities.name: Invoked Spell 2
abilities.description: The previous invoked ability is moved to the fifth slot in the process, while the previous ability in the fifth slot is lost.
